channel.title: Sun's Blog
channel.description: Exploring software engineering, AI development, and the art of building great products.

item.title: My Medical AI Agent Takeaway: The Value of AI Products Often Doesn't Depend on How Smart They Are
item.description: Key insights from a dinner conversation with a Medical AI Agent startup founder: The true value of AI products isn't determined by technical complexity, but by where it resides in the business workflow.
item.content:encoded:
Initially, I thought the hardest part of building a Medical AI Agent was the technology. But after our conversation, I realized the real key is: Where do you place the AI?
Two days ago, I had dinner with a founder who runs a startup building Medical AI Agents.
I had assumed they were building the

item.title: AI Won't Replace You — But It Will Replace Someone Who Only Follows Steps
item.description: In the AI era, the real skill isn't knowing how to use tools. It's whether you can still judge: Is this answer correct? Suitable? Risky?
item.content:encoded:
The Bottom Line
!AI Won't Replace You — But It Will Replace Someone Who Only Follows Steps(/blog/2026-06-16-ai-judgement/image-1.png)
The more I use AI, the less I see it as a mere "productivity tool."
It's more like a very smart, very diligent intern — capable of getting things done, but occasio
